name: Harry Barris
abstract: Harry Barris (November 24, 1905 – December 13, 1962) was an American popular singer and songwriter. He was one of the earliest singers to use "scat singing" in recordings.

about_quotes.speaker: Patricia Willard
about_quotes.evidence: Al Rinker -- is that his name? Used to be with Bing Crosby and Harry Barris when they were with Paul Whiteman?

about_quotes.speaker: Red Norvo
about_quotes.evidence: I can remember one time going with Mildred when he and Harry Barris were living together
